channel.title: Make Some Noise
channel.description: Latest releases from Make Some Noise on Dropout.tv

item.title: Eat an Animal Before It Eats You Show
item.description:
Jiavani, Ross, and Jess create erotic novel titles and try to get the perfect shot.

Duration: 33:39

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, jiavani, ross bryant, jessica mckenna

item.title: Jacob, Kimia, and Jeremy Impersonate Each Other
item.description:
Jacob, Kimia, and Jeremy sell lemonade and explain what a boobie inspector is.

Duration: 36:22

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, jacob wysocki, kimia behpoornia, jeremy culhane
